rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, PEOPLE OF THE VS. REGAL STONE, LTD et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO MONTEREY COUNTY***
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue, Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 3, 2009. LINE 1, DEFENDANT JOHN COTA'S Motion To Transfer Venue. MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 394 GRANTED. THIS MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO CALIFORNIA SUPERIOR COURT, COUNTY OF MONTEREY FOR ALL FURTHER PROCEEDINGS. =(302/CWW/SK-X)

rulings.Case Title: JOVAN PAYTON VS. RONNIE LOCKETT et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 3, 2009. LINE 11, PLAINTIFF JOVAN PAYTON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. HABITABILITY IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO EACH ALLEGED BREACH. TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT EXIST REGARDING DEFENDANT LOCKETT'S ALLEGED DISABILITY, WHETHER PAMELA JOHNSON IS A TENANT OR A CARETAKER, WHETHER THE DOG IS A SERVICE ANIMAL, AND WHETHER PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO MAKE REASONABLE ACCOMMODATIONS UNDER FEHA. =(302/CWW/PB)
